sentences.target: Tu gardes mon sac, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty ɡaʁd mɔ̃ sak, sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu gardes mon sac, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty ɡaʁd mɔ̃ sak, sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you watch my bag, please?
translations.de: Bitte pass auf meinen Rucksack auf.
translations.it: Per favore, tieni d'occhio il mio zaino.
translations.zh-Hans: 请帮我看一下我的背包。
translations.pt: Por favor, cuida da minha mochila.
translations.vi: Làm ơn trông giúp ba lô của tôi.
translations.nl: Let even op mijn rugzak, alsjeblieft.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, приглянь за моїм рюкзаком.
translations.hi: कृपया मेरे बैग का ध्यान रखना.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, πρόσεξε το σακίδιό μου.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, pass på sekken min.
translations.ro: Te rog, ai grijă de rucsacul meu.
translations.da: Vær sød at holde øje med min rygsæk.
translations.ja: リュックを見ていてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; informal singular 'you'.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'garder' (to keep). Main verb.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; agrees with 'sac'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'gardes'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' (if), elided before vowel; introduces the clause in the polite formula.
3rd-person masculine singular subject pronoun; subject of 'plaît' in the formula 's'il te plaît'.
2nd-person singular clitic indirect object pronoun; complements 'plaît'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'plaire'; in the fixed polite expression meaning 'please'.

sentences.target: Je vais garder une place pour toi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ ɡaʁde yn plas puʁ twa/

translations.fr: Je vais garder une place pour toi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ ɡaʁde yn plas puʁ twa/
translations.en: I'm going to save a seat for you.
translations.es: Te voy a guardar un asiento.
translations.de: Ich halte dir einen Platz frei.
translations.pt: Vou guardar um lugar para você.
translations.vi: Mình sẽ giữ chỗ cho bạn.
translations.nl: Ik houd een plek voor je vrij.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे लिए एक सीट बचाकर रखूँगा.
translations.nb: Jeg skal holde av en plass til deg.
translations.id: Aku akan menjaga tempat duduk untukmu.
translations.sv: Jag sparar en plats åt dig.
translations.da: Jeg holder en plads til dig.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Auxiliary 'aller', present indicative 1st person singular; forms the futur proche with an infinitive.
Infinitive; main lexical verb governed by auxiliary 'aller' (futur proche).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'place'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'garder'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary phrase.
Stressed 2nd-person singular pronoun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On garde le chat ce week-end.

translations.fr: On garde le chat ce week-end.
translations.en: We're looking after the cat this weekend.
translations.es: Este fin de semana cuidamos al gato.
translations.de: Wir passen dieses Wochenende auf die Katze auf.
translations.it: Questo fine settimana ci occupiamo del gatto.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个周末我们照看这只猫。
translations.yue: 我哋呢個週末照顧隻貓。
translations.ru: Мы присмотрим за котом в выходные.
translations.pt: Neste fim de semana vamos cuidar do gato.
translations.he: בסוף השבוע הזה נשמור על החתול.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này bọn mình trông con mèo.
translations.nl: Dit weekend passen we op de kat.
translations.hi: इस सप्ताहांत हम बिल्ली की देखभाल करेंगे.
translations.pl: W ten weekend zajmiemy się kotem.
translations.el: Αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο θα προσέχουμε τη γάτα.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini kami akan menjaga kucing.
translations.sv: I helgen tar vi hand om katten.
translations.ro: În weekend avem grijă de pisică.
translations.cs: O víkendu se postaráme o kočku.
translations.ja: 今週末は猫の世話をします。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular impersonal/personal pronoun meaning 'one' or colloquially 'we'; subject.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb agreeing with 'on'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'chat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'garde'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determines the time noun 'week-end'.
Common noun, masculine; borrowed, hyphenated form; functions as a time expression with 'ce'.

sentences.target: Nous gardons les enfants ce soir.

translations.fr: Nous gardons les enfants ce soir.
translations.es: Esta noche cuidamos a los niños.
translations.de: Wir passen heute Abend auf die Kinder auf.
translations.yue: 今晚我哋會睇住啲小朋友。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы присмотрим за детьми.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos cuidar das crianças.
translations.vi: Tối nay bọn mình trông bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Vanavond passen we op de kinderen.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми доглянемо за дітьми.
translations.hu: Ma este mi vigyázunk a gyerekekre.
translations.hi: आज रात हम बच्चों की देखभाल करेंगे.
translations.id: Malam ini kami akan menjaga anak-anak.
translations.ja: 今夜は子どもたちの面倒を見ます.

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person plural of 'garder'; main verb.
Definite article, plural; determines 'enfants'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'gardons'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determines 'soir' in a time expression.
Common noun, masculine singular; time noun forming an adverbial with 'ce' ('this evening/tonight').
